li.label: no protection
li.description: Need something on. Going to have an accident.

li.label: unprotected
li.description: Really should have protection on right now. Not good.

li.label: no diapew
li.description: Don't have my diapew. Need one.

li.label: no diapew
li.description: Need diapew. Where diapew.

li.label: bare
li.description: Nuffin on. *fussing*

li.label: don't need one
li.description: Don't need protection. Perfectly in control.

li.label: still fine
li.description: No protection on. Still managing. Don't need it.

li.label: don't need it
li.description: Don't need a diapew. Can do it myself.

li.label: don't need one
li.description: Don't need diapew. I'm big.

li.label: bare
li.description: Nuffin on. *restless*

li.label: going without
li.description: No protection on. That's fine by me.

li.label: free
li.description: No protection. Not a problem.

li.label: free
li.description: Not wearin anyfing. Dat's fine.

li.label: no diapew
li.description: No diapew. Fine.

li.label: bare
li.description: Nuffin on. *murmuring*

li.label: missing it
li.description: Want my diaper on. Something feels wrong without it.

li.label: want my diaper
li.description: No protection on. Feels really wrong.

li.label: want diapew
li.description: Don't have my diapew. Want it back.

li.label: want diapew
li.description: Want diapew. Now.

li.label: bare
li.description: Nuffin on. *whimpering*

li.label: wearing it
li.description: Have to wear a diaper. That doesn't mean I have to like it.

li.label: protected
li.description: Wearing protection. It's on. It's there.

li.label: diapew on
li.description: My diapew is on. Dat's okay.

li.label: padded
li.description: Nice and padded.

li.label: clean
li.description: Soft soft. *settled*

li.label: in a diaper
li.description: Padded like a toddler. Every second in this is an insult to everything I was.

li.label: padded up
li.description: Put in a diaper like a little kid. I hate all of this.

li.label: don't want dis
li.description: I keep tellin dem I don't want it but dey put it on anyway and I just let dem. How come I let dem.

li.label: don't want diapew
li.description: Don't want diapew. No.

li.label: clean
li.description: Soft. *peaceful*

li.label: padded and fine
li.description: Wearing a diaper. Let anyone try to make something of that.

li.label: padded
li.description: My diaper is on. Don't care what anyone thinks.

li.label: padded
li.description: Got my diapew on. Dat's fine.

li.label: padded
li.description: Diapew on. Good.

li.label: clean
li.description: Soft. *cooing*

li.label: padded up
li.description: Clean diaper on. Soft and comfortable. Right where it belongs.

li.label: padded
li.description: Clean diaper on. Really like this feeling.

li.label: nice diapew
li.description: Got my diapew on. It's weally nice.

li.label: soft diapew
li.description: Soft and cosy. Wuv my diapew.

li.label: clean
li.description: Soft warm. *cooing*

li.label: wet diaper
li.description: Wearing a wet diaper.

li.label: wet diaper
li.description: Still in a wet diaper. Gross. Wish someone would just deal with it already.

li.label: wet diapew
li.description: Diapew wet. Don't like it. Someone must fix it.

li.label: wet
li.description: Wet diapew. Someone come. Pease.

li.label: warm
li.description: Warm. *settled*

li.label: still in this
li.description: Still in a wet diaper. Still having to look people in the eye. Still having to exist like this. I know exactly what's happening and I can't make it stop and that is not something I can think about too long.

li.label: can't think about it
li.description: Still wet. Still wearing it. If I actually stop and think about this I'm going to lose it. So I'm not thinking about it.

li.label: still wet and waiting
li.description: Diapew still wet. Still on. Da part dat hates dis keeps being loud about it.

li.label: wet diapew
li.description: Wet diapew. Still dere. No wike. No wike at all.

li.label: warm
li.description: Warm. *quiet*

li.label: wet diaper
li.description: Wet diaper on. Not uncomfortable. Not a problem. People make this weird and it doesn't have to be.

li.label: wet and honestly fine
li.description: In a wet diaper. Still fine. Kind of thought it'd bother me more than it does.

li.label: wet diapew
li.description: Diapew is wet. Dat's just what happens. It's fine.

li.label: wet
li.description: Wet diapew. 's okay.

li.label: warm
li.description: Warm. *content*

li.label: love being wet
li.description: Wet diaper on. Warm. Heavy. Could stay in this for hours and be completely at peace with that.

li.label: warm and comfortable
li.description: Wet diaper. Warm all over. Honestly kind of perfect right now.

li.label: warm wet diapew
li.description: Diapew all warm and squishy. Wuv being like dis.

li.label: warm
li.description: Warm wet diapew. So nice. Wuv.

li.label: warm
li.description: Warm warm. *wriggles*

li.label: need a change
li.description: Diaper is full. Need a change. Not comfortable.

li.label: really need a change
li.description: My diaper is full. Cannot ignore this.

li.label: full diapew
li.description: My diapew is full. Need someone to change me.

li.label: heavy
li.description: Diapew heavy. Want change.

li.label: full
li.description: Heavy. No wike. *squirming*

li.label: full diaper
li.description: Diaper is full. This is what I've been reduced to.

li.label: full diaper
li.description: My diaper is full. The person I was this morning would not believe this.

li.label: full diapew
li.description: My diapew is full. Da bit dat hates dis is still dere.

li.label: heavy diapew
li.description: Diapew full and heavy. No wike.

li.label: full
li.description: Heavy. No wike. *squirming*

li.label: needs changing
li.description: Diaper is full. Not a crisis. Just needs changing.

li.label: needs changing
li.description: Diaper full. Someone will sort it eventually.

li.label: full diapew
li.description: Diapew is full. Someone will change me.

li.label: full
li.description: Full diapew. Someone come.

li.label: full
li.description: Heavy. *squirming*

li.label: getting heavy
li.description: Diaper getting full. Can sit with it a little longer.

li.label: full diaper
li.description: Diaper is heavy now. Probably time to change.

li.label: heavy diapew
li.description: Diapew getting weally heavy. Change soon.

li.label: heavy
li.description: Diapew very heavy. Hmm.

li.label: full
li.description: Too heavy. *squirming*

li.label: needs changing now
li.description: Diaper is at its limit. Need a change right now.

li.label: way too full
li.description: My diaper can't take any more. This is awful.

li.label: flooding
li.description: My diapew is way way too full. Need a change RIGHT NOW.

li.label: too full
li.description: Diapew too full. Too much.

li.label: too heavy
li.description: Too heavy. BAD. *crying*

li.label: overflowing
li.description: Diaper overflowing. I have no words for how low I have fallen.

li.label: overflowing
li.description: My diaper is past its limit. Cannot believe any of this.

li.label: too full
li.description: My diapew is way too full. I weally weally hate dis.

li.label: too full
li.description: Diapew too full. No wike no wike.

li.label: too heavy
li.description: Too heavy. BAD. *crying*

li.label: change time
li.description: Past its limit. Change time.

li.label: change time
li.description: Way too full. Change time.

li.label: too full
li.description: Diapew way too full. Weally need a change.

li.label: too full
li.description: Diapew too full. Change now.

li.label: too heavy
li.description: Too heavy. *crying*

li.label: past comfortable
li.description: Past comfortable now. Starting to be a problem. Need a change.

li.label: too full
li.description: Way too full now. Need a change.

li.label: too full
li.description: Diapew way too full now. Change pwease.

li.label: too full
li.description: Diapew too much. Too heavy.

li.label: too heavy
li.description: Too heavy. No wike. *crying*

li.label: something in the air
li.description: Something off nearby. Someone might need attending to.

li.label: faint smell
li.description: There's a smell. Faint but there.

li.label: somefing smells
li.description: Somefing smells a little funny.

li.label: smell
li.description: Smell somefing.

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: I smell that
li.description: Someone nearby needs a change. Unmistakable.

li.label: something's off
li.description: Something smells off. Someone needs to sort themselves out.

li.label: someone smelly
li.description: Somefing smells funny near me.

li.label: smell
li.description: Smell somefing. No wike.

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: faint whiff
li.description: Someone nearby needs a change. Fine by me.

li.label: barely there
li.description: There's a smell. Doesn't bother me.

li.label: faint smell
li.description: Smell somefing a bit. Dat's okay.

li.label: smell
li.description: Smell somefing. Fine.

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: familiar
li.description: Someone nearby needs a change. Unremarkable.

li.label: barely there
li.description: Faint smell. Part of the environment.

li.label: faint smell
li.description: Smell somefing a tiny bit. Dat's fine.

li.label: smell
li.description: Smell somefing. Fine.

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: noticeable
li.description: Someone nearby needs a change. Getting hard to ignore.

li.label: noticeable
li.description: The smell is clear now. Someone needs to deal with that.

li.label: someone smelly
li.description: Someone near me is stinky stinky. Dey need a change.

li.label: stinky
li.description: Someone stinky nearby.

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: someone needs a change
li.description: Someone nearby needs a change. Not acceptable.

li.label: clear and bad
li.description: The smell is clear. Someone needs to sort themselves out right now.

li.label: smells bad
li.description: Someone near me smells weally bad. No wike.

li.label: stinky stinky
li.description: Stinky stinky! No wike!

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: noticeable
li.description: Someone nearby needs a change. Doesn't offend me.

li.label: it's there
li.description: Noticeable smell. Comes with the territory.

li.label: smelly nearby
li.description: Someone smells nearby. Dat's fine.

li.label: smell
li.description: Smell nearby. Hmm.

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: someone needs a change
li.description: Someone nearby needs a change. No big deal.

li.label: noticeable
li.description: The smell is there. Doesn't bother me.

li.label: smelly
li.description: Someone smells a bit. Dat's okay.

li.label: smell
li.description: Smell nearby. Fine.

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: strong smell
li.description: The smell is bad. Someone is really overdue for a change.

li.label: really bad
li.description: This is hard to ignore. Someone needs sorting out.

li.label: weally stinky
li.description: Someone near me smells weally weally bad.

li.label: very stinky stinky
li.description: Weally stinky stinky! Yuck!

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: bad
li.description: The smell is getting to me. Someone needs to deal with this.

li.label: awful
li.description: This is genuinely unpleasant. Someone needs to change right now.

li.label: awful smell
li.description: Dis smells weally awful. Weally don't wike it.

li.label: so stinky stinky
li.description: SO stinky stinky! Weally no wike!

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: getting strong
li.description: Getting a bit much even for me.

li.label: strong
li.description: The smell is significant. Still fine.

li.label: pretty stinky
li.description: Dat's pretty smelly. Whatever.

li.label: stinky
li.description: Weally stinky. Hmm.

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: strong smell
li.description: Getting strong. Even I notice it at this point.

li.label: pretty strong
li.description: The smell is strong. Still pretty normal.

li.label: smelly
li.description: Weally smelly nearby. Dat's okay.

li.label: stinky
li.description: Stinky nearby. Hmm.

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: overpowering
li.description: The smell is overwhelming. Need air right now.

li.label: unbearable
li.description: This is too much. Someone needs to fix this right now.

li.label: SO stinky
li.description: Someone smells SO stinky stinky! Change dem RIGHT NOW.

li.label: change dem!
li.description: SO stinky! Change dem NOW!

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: cannot stand this
li.description: The smell is overwhelming. Completely unacceptable.

li.label: overwhelming
li.description: The smell is awful. This should not be allowed to happen.

li.label: terrible smell
li.description: Dis smells SO bad. Weally weally hate it.

li.label: so so stinky
li.description: SO stinky! Weally no wike no wike!

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: too much
li.description: Even I have limits. Someone needs changing.

li.label: okay that's a lot
li.description: The smell is overpowering. Limits exist.

li.label: way too stinky
li.description: Dat's way way too smelly. Even I fink so.

li.label: very stinky
li.description: Weally weally stinky. Too much.

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: overpowering
li.description: That is genuinely overwhelming. Someone needs a change.

li.label: very strong
li.description: That is a lot. Someone really needs changing.

li.label: very stinky
li.description: Dat's weally weally smelly. Someone need a change.

li.label: very stinky
li.description: Weally stinky. Too much.

li.label: no reaction
li.description: *doesn't notice*

li.label: soiled myself
li.description: Lost control with nothing on. Cannot face anyone right now.

li.label: had an accident
li.description: Had an accident with nothing on. Oh no. Oh no.

li.label: made a mess
li.description: Made a big mess. Didn't mean to. Sowwy.

li.label: uh oh
li.description: Uh oh. Made a big nono. Sowwy sowwy.

li.label: messy
li.description: Messy. Warm. *wriggles*

li.label: complete failure
li.description: Lost control with nothing on. Cannot describe how low this feels.

li.label: this is awful
li.description: Had an accident with nothing on. I am not this person.

li.label: made a mess
li.description: Made a big mess. Da bit of me dat cares is still dere. Sowwy.

li.label: uh oh
li.description: Uh oh. Big nono. Somefing feels wrong. Sowwy sowwy.

li.label: messy
li.description: Messy. Warm. *wriggles*

li.label: had an accident
li.description: Had an accident. It happened. Moving on.

li.label: had an accident
li.description: Had an accident. Not great. Not spiralling.

li.label: made a mess
li.description: Made a mess. Dat happens.

li.label: uh oh
li.description: Uh oh. Made a mess. Dat's okay.

li.label: messy
li.description: Messy. *wriggles*

li.label: should've had protection
li.description: Had an accident with nothing on. A diaper would have handled that.

li.label: needed my diaper
li.description: Had an accident. A diaper would have been so much better.

li.label: needed my diapew
li.description: Had an accidant. Wish I had my diapew on.

li.label: want diapew
li.description: Made a mess. Want my diapew.

li.label: messy
li.description: Messy. *babbling*

li.label: wet my pants
li.description: Wet my pants. Just stood there and let it happen.

li.label: had an accident
li.description: Had an accident in my pants. People were right there.

li.label: wet my pants
li.description: Had an accidant in my pants. Should've asked to go sooner.

li.label: wet pants
li.description: Wet pants. Uh oh.

li.label: wet
li.description: Wet. Warm. *settled*

li.label: wet myself
li.description: Wet my pants like a small child. The shame has a physical weight.

li.label: cannot believe this
li.description: Wet my pants. In front of people. I am not a child. This is not happening.

li.label: wet my pants
li.description: Had a pants accidant. Da part dat knows dis is wrong is still dere.

li.label: wet pants
li.description: Wet pants. Dat's wrong. Sowwy.

li.label: wet
li.description: Wet. Warm. *settled*

li.label: wet pants
li.description: Wet my pants. Not a crisis.

li.label: accident
li.description: Had an accident in my pants. It happens.

li.label: wet pants
li.description: Pants got wet. Dat's fine.

li.label: wet pants
li.description: Wet pants. Hmm.

li.label: wet
li.description: Wet. *content*

li.label: should've worn one
li.description: Wet my pants. A diaper would have handled that perfectly.

li.label: needed my diaper
li.description: Wet my pants. A diaper would have caught that.

li.label: needed my diapew
li.description: Wet my pants. Want my diapew.

li.label: wet pants
li.description: Wet. Want my diapew.

li.label: wet
li.description: Wet. *babbling*

li.label: lost it
li.description: Lost it. Just like that. No warning, no time to do anything.

li.label: happened again
li.description: Happened again. Didn't even realize until after.

li.label: accidant in diapew
li.description: Had an accidant in my diapew.

li.label: made wawa
li.description: Made oopsie. Don't wike."

li.label: warmy
li.description: Warmy. *squirms a little*

li.label: no control
li.description: There was no control. I was right there, fighting it, and it happened anyway. My body doesn't listen.

li.label: body did it again
li.description: Body just did it. No input from me. Just happened while I was standing there trying not to let it.

li.label: accidant
li.description: Had an accidant. Da part of me dat fights dis was right dere and it didn't matter one bit.

li.label: made wawa
li.description: Went in my diapew. Didn't wanna. Don't wike it.

li.label: warmy
li.description: Warmy. *stares at nothing*

li.label: used it
li.description: Used my diaper. That's literally what it's there for.

li.label: went in diaper
li.description: Went in my diaper. No big deal. Handled.

li.label: diapew did its job
li.description: Went in my diapew. Dat's da whole point of it.

li.label: made wawa
li.description: Made wawa.

li.label: warmy
li.description: Warmy. *shrugs*

li.label: warm
li.description: Wet diaper. There it is. That warmth. Nothing else like it.

li.label: warm and wet
li.description: Just went in my diaper. This is the best part of wearing one.

li.label: warm diapew
li.description: Went in my diapew. So nice and warm. Wuv it.

li.label: made wawa
li.description: Nice warm diapew. So cozy. *smiles*

li.label: warmy
li.description: Warmy. *wiggles happily*

li.label: wet in my sleep
li.description: Had an accident in my diaper in my sleep. When did this start happening.

li.label: wet in my sleep
li.description: Had an accident in my diaper in my sleep. Not again.

li.label: wet overnight
li.description: Had an accidant in my diapew while sweeping. Dat keeps happenin.

li.label: wet this morning
li.description: Wet diapew dis mornin.

li.label: warm morning
li.description: Warm dis mornin. *settled*

li.label: accident in my sleep
li.description: Had an accident in my diaper in my sleep. Again. This cannot keep happening.

li.label: wet in my sleep
li.description: Had an accident in my sleep. Why does my body keep doing this.

li.label: wet overnight
li.description: Had an accidant in my diapew sweeping again. Weally don't wike dat.

li.label: wet this morning
li.description: Wet diapew dis mornin. Somefing feels wrong.

li.label: warm morning
li.description: Warm dis mornin. *peaceful*

li.label: woke up wet
li.description: Had an accident overnight. Good thing my diaper was on.

li.label: woke up wet
li.description: Had an accident in my sleep. Diaper caught it.

li.label: wet overnight
li.description: Had an accidant in my diapew sweeping. Dat's fine.

li.label: wet morning
li.description: Wet overnight. Fine.

li.label: warm morning
li.description: Warm dis mornin. *content*

li.label: warm morning
li.description: Woke up with a warm wet diaper. Wonderful way to start a day.

li.label: warm morning
li.description: Woke up warm and wet. Really love waking up like this.

li.label: warm morning
li.description: Woke up in a warm diapew. Wuv it.

li.label: warm morning
li.description: Warm and cosy dis mornin. Nice.

li.label: warm morning
li.description: Warm dis mornin. Wuv. *cooing*

li.label: wet the bed
li.description: Woke up wet. Cold sheets. Not the first time.

li.label: wet the bed
li.description: Sheets are wet. Again. Not again.

li.label: wet da bed
li.description: Made da sheets all wet. Dat keeps happenin.

li.label: wet sheets
li.description: Sheets all wet. Cold cold.

li.label: wet
li.description: Wet wet. Cold. *fussing*

li.label: wet the bed
li.description: Soaked the bed in my sleep. I am not a child. This is not who I am.

li.label: wet the bed
li.description: Wet the bed again. What is happening to me. This cannot keep happening.

li.label: wet da bed
li.description: Wet da bed AGAIN. Don't need diapews tho. I don't. Don't say dat.

li.label: wet sheets
li.description: Sheets all wet. No wike. Sowwy sowwy.

li.label: wet
li.description: Wet wet. Cold now. *fussing*

li.label: wet the bed
li.description: Woke up wet again. Should probably just sleep padded.

li.label: wet the bed
li.description: Wet the bed. Could be worse.

li.label: wet da bed
li.description: Wet da bed overnight. Dat just happens.

li.label: wet sheets
li.description: Wet sheets. Fine.

li.label: wet
li.description: Wet. Warm. *content*

li.label: wet the bed
li.description: Sheets wet. Should just sleep in a diaper.

li.label: wet the bed
li.description: Woke up wet. Not the worst feeling.

li.label: wet da bed
li.description: Wet da bed. Cosy even wet.

li.label: wet
li.description: Wet. Warm. Soft.

li.label: warm
li.description: Wet warm. *cooing*

li.label: wet by bedfellow
li.description: Person I shared a bed with had an accident. Genuinely unpleasant.

li.label: bedfellow's accident
li.description: My bedmate had an accident in our bed. Had to sleep in that.

li.label: someone wet da bed
li.description: Da person in my bed made it all wet. Didn't wike dat.

li.label: wet bed
li.description: Someone made da bed wet.

li.label: wet
li.description: Wet. *doesn't really register*

li.label: this is unacceptable
li.description: My bedmate had an accident on me. Completely unacceptable.

li.label: soaked by bedfellow
li.description: My bedmate had an accident on me. This is awful.

li.label: someone wet da bed
li.description: Someone wet da bed while I was in it. Weally didn't wike dat.

li.label: wet bed
li.description: Someone made da bed wet. No wike.

li.label: wet
li.description: Wet. *doesn't notice*

li.label: bedfellow's accident
li.description: My bedmate had an accident. Comes with the territory.

li.label: bedfellow's accident
li.description: Bedmate had an accident. Whatever.

li.label: wet bed
li.description: Bedfewwow had an accidant. Dat's okay.

li.label: wet bed
li.description: Bed got wet. Fine.

li.label: wet
li.description: Wet. *doesn't notice*

li.label: bedfellow's accident
li.description: My bedmate had an accident. Really not a big deal.

li.label: bedfellow's accident
li.description: Bed got wet overnight. Fine.

li.label: wet bed
li.description: Bed got wet overnight. Dat's okay.

li.label: wet
li.description: Wet. Dat's okay.

li.label: wet
li.description: Wet. *doesn't notice*

li.label: onesie
li.description: Wearing a onesie. The comfort is real. The implications are not nothing.

li.label: wearing a onesie
li.description: In a onesie now. Still getting used to that.

li.label: onesie
li.description: Got my onesie on. A bit silly but comfy.

li.label: onesie
li.description: Onesie on. Soft.

li.label: onesie
li.description: Soft warm. *cooing*

li.label: hated onesie
li.description: Wearing a onesie. Beneath my dignity in every way.

li.label: hate this onesie
li.description: In a onesie like a little kid. I hate this so much.

li.label: don't want dis
li.description: Don't want to wear dis onesie. But I can't seem to stop.

li.label: don't want onesie
li.description: Don't want onesie. Somefing feels wrong.

li.label: onesie
li.description: Soft. *peaceful*

li.label: comfortable
li.description: Wearing a onesie. Comfortable. Anyone got a problem with that.

li.label: onesie, fine
li.description: Wearing a onesie. Don't care what anyone thinks.

li.label: onesie
li.description: Got my onesie on. Dat's fine.

li.label: onesie
li.description: Onesie on. Warm.

li.label: onesie
li.description: Soft. *cooing*

li.label: love my onesie
li.description: Snapped in and soft. My onesie makes everything feel simpler.

li.label: love my onesie
li.description: My onesie is so soft and comfortable. Really love it.

li.label: wuv my onesie
li.description: My onesie is weally weally nice.

li.label: wuv onesie
li.description: Onesie so soft. Wuv it.

li.label: onesie
li.description: Soft warm. Wuv. *cooing*

li.label: slept in a crib
li.description: Rails made it feel like a cage. Cramped and wrong.

li.label: slept in a crib
li.description: Slept in a crib. Felt small and wrong.

li.label: slept in crib
li.description: Slept in my cwib. Was okay.

li.label: slept in crib
li.description: Cwib was warm. Slept good.

li.label: crib
li.description: Safe warm. *content*

li.label: caged like a baby
li.description: Crib confined me like an infant. Will not accept this.

li.label: slept in a crib
li.description: Slept in a crib like a little child. Know what that means and hate it.

li.label: slept in crib
li.description: Da cwib felt wrong. Da bit dat knows dat is still dere.

li.label: slept in crib
li.description: Cwib felt safe. Da part dat hated dat is weally quiet now.

li.label: crib
li.description: Safe warm. *peaceful*

li.label: slept in a crib
li.description: Slept in a crib. Own it.

li.label: slept in a crib
li.description: Crib was comfortable. Not pretending otherwise.

li.label: liked da cwib
li.description: Da cwib was weally good. Da rails felt safe.

li.label: nice cwib
li.description: Cwib was warm. Liked it.

li.label: crib
li.description: Safe warm. *content*

li.label: loved the crib
li.description: Crib felt safe and snug and exactly right. Would choose it again.

li.label: loved the crib
li.description: My crib is just the right size right now. Slept wonderfully.

li.label: wuv my cwib
li.description: My cwib fits me perfecly. Wuv sweeping in it.

li.label: wuv cwib
li.description: Cwib so warm so safe. Wuv.

li.label: crib
li.description: Safe warm. Wuv. *cooing*
